title: Referral Program
subtitle: Invite friends to redeem and earn rewards

link.title: My Referral Link
link.hint: When users registered via this link redeem and use the service, you will receive rewards

rules.title: Referral Rules
items: For every 100M quota redeemed by your invitee, you earn ¥1; 500M earns ¥5, and so on.
Lifetime cashback: you earn rewards on every future purchase by your invitee.
Self-referral abuse is strictly prohibited. Violators will be banned and have their quota reset.
Withdrawals are processed around the 1st of each month (minimum ¥10).

claim.title: Claimable Rewards
claim.error: Request failed, please try again later
